acceptance_invariants: No dependency installation or new third-party import.
No Temporal/Inngest runtime start, registration, workflow, activity, or event emission.
No service_requests mutation of any kind.
No approvals, assignments, worker starts, API calls, browser/account/public/payment/wallet/security/legal actions.
Nonzero exit only for malformed fixture, live-status mismatch when requested, or expected-output mismatch.

acceptance_tests.expected: 14 result rows, output state counts 11 parked / 1 complete terminal / 2 rejected terminal, zero failures.
Writes only the requested local result JSON artifact and prints ok JSON.

acceptance_tests.command_preview: Compare service_requests tracked fields before/after dry run.
acceptance_tests.expected: No request status, assignment, start, completion, decision note, or updated_at changes.

implementation_no_go_conditions: Proposed command writes to service_requests, approvals, agents pool registry, or task lifecycle tables.
Proposed command imports/starts Temporal, Inngest, browser automation, model providers, or network clients.
Proposed command treats fixture output as approval to execute worker actions.
Proposed command silently ignores live-status mismatch when --check-live-status is enabled.

dispatch_insertion.behavior: init_db(conn) only for read-only live status checks, then call dry_run_durable_service_request_reducer(conn, args).
dispatch_insertion.location: main() command dispatch after write-trace-report or adjacent report-only commands

new_functions.name: dry_run_durable_service_request_reducer
new_functions.responsibility: Load fixture JSON and optional live DB statuses, compute deterministic dry-run results matching agent_company.durable_adapter_dry_run_result.v1, print JSON, optionally write a local result artifact.
new_functions.suggested_location: near other report writer functions before main()

arguments.description: Optional local JSON output path under reports/durable-orchestration.
arguments.name: --result-path

arguments.description: Read service_requests statuses and fail on fixture mismatch; read-only.
arguments.name: --check-live-status

parser_insertion.location: main() argparse setup near other read/report commands

review_decision.summary: A future local CLI command may be implemented only as a deterministic fixture reader/result writer. It must not approve, assign, start, mutate service_requests, call APIs, import durable runtimes, or touch external systems.

rollback_plan: Remove the new parser branch and dispatch branch from tools/agent_company.py.
Remove the pure dry-run helper function and any constants added only for the command.
Keep existing review/static artifacts immutable; do not delete ledger history.
title: Implementation review packet for optional local durable adapter dry-run CLI command
